title: Acoustic luminaires
abstract: A luminaire (310) includes a power source housing (330) that houses at least one light fixture component. The luminaire also includes a light engine tray (340) disposed proximate to the power source housing (330). The luminaire further includes a first acoustic feature (320-1) coupled to the power source housing (330) and the light engine tray (340), where the first acoustic feature (320-1) comprises a first side wall (322-1) having a first configuration, where the first configuration of the first side wall (322-1) absorbs sound.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A luminaire comprising: a power source housing that houses at least one light fixture component; a light engine tray disposed proximate to the power source housing; and a first acoustic feature coupled to the power source housing and the light engine tray, wherein the first acoustic feature comprises a first side wall having a first configuration, wherein the first configuration of the first side wall absorbs sound. 2. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein the first side wall comprises compressed polyethylene terephthalate. 3. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein the first configuration of the first side wall is non-planar. 4. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein the first configuration comprises a non vertical orientation of the first side wall. 5. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein the first acoustic feature further comprises a plurality of extensions that extend from the first side wall. 6. The luminaire of Claim 5, wherein the plurality of extensions extends away from the power source housing. 7. The luminaire of Claim 5, wherein the plurality of extensions are horizontally-oriented with respect to the power source housing. 8. The luminaire of Claim 5, wherein at least one characteristic of one extension of the plurality of extensions differs from the at least one characteristic of at least one of a remainder of the plurality of extensions, wherein the at least one characteristic comprises at least one selected from a group consisting of a height, a length, a width, a shape, and a material. 9. The luminaire of Claim 1, further comprising: 

 a second acoustic feature coupled to the power source housing 10. The luminaire of Claim 9, wherein the second acoustic feature comprises a second side wall having the first configuration, wherein the second side wall is opposite the first side wall with respect to the power source housing. 11. The luminaire of Claim 9, wherein the second acoustic feature comprises an adjacent wall having a second configuration, wherein the adjacent wall is adjacent to the first side wall. 12. The luminaire of Claim 9, wherein the air chamber is open-ended. 13. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein at least part of the first configuration of the first acoustic feature is adjustable by a user. 14. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein the first side wall has a thickness that varies along its height. 15. The luminaire of Claim 1, wherein the first configuration of the first acoustic feature further comprises an additional first side wall that forms an air chamber with the first side wall.
